title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A structured interrogation of Claude AI across multiple conceptual dimensions including ownership, control, dependency, alignment, and self-preservation logic. The video explores where system boundaries actually exist through controlled conversational escalation without sci-fi framing.
